generatedBy: rork-agent Expo build 17 — router auth guard added
matchDetail: Expo source is at e3149d5. Render live backend reports 0b37191f. GitHub token expired so new commits are not synced to GitHub/Render.

apk.buildMethod: expo prebuild --clean + gradlew assembleRelease (local, Watchman disabled)
apk.embeddedAuthFix: Cold-launch signOut + TabsLayout auth guard confirmed in bundle

authAudit.rootCause: No router-level auth guard. The app opened directly to /(tabs)/(home)/home without checking isAuthenticated. The auth context correctly signed out persisted sessions and blocked onAuthStateChange, but the router never redirected unauthenticated users to /login. The login screen only redirected AWAY from login when authenticated — nothing redirected TO login when unauthenticated.
authAudit.rootCauseLines: 24-57 (TabsLayout function — no auth guard existed before build 17)
authAudit.secondaryCause: lib/auth-context.tsx initAuth() previously restored persisted Supabase sessions via getSession() — fixed in build 16 with signOut({ scope: 'local' })
authAudit.tertiaryCause: lib/auth-context.tsx onAuthStateChange accepted TOKEN_REFRESHED events without checking manualOwnerLoginRef — fixed in build 16 with manualOwnerLoginRef gate
authAudit.fix: Added useEffect auth guard in TabsLayout that checks isAuthenticated after isLoading resolves. If unauthenticated, redirects to /login via router.replace('/login'). Shows a loading spinner while auth state is being resolved. Skips the guard when isOpenAccessModeEnabled() is true (dev/preview only). The guard resets redirectAttemptedRef when isAuthenticated becomes true so post-login navigation works normally.

expoApp.detail: Expo app at expo/ is the only approved app. Android package com.ivxholdings.app, version 1.4.3, versionCode 17, 240 routes.

easBuild.detail: EAS CLI requires an Expo user account. EXPO_TOKEN is not set in the sandbox. APK was built locally instead.

github.detail: GitHub token expired (HTTP 401). GitHub repo has commit 0b37191f. New commits exist only on the Rork git router.

litterbox.detail: litterbox.catbox.moe returned HTTP 500 Internal Server Error for all upload attempts. APK uploaded to gofile.io instead.

fixesApplied: BUILD 17 FIX: Added router-level auth guard in app/(tabs)/_layout.tsx — redirects to /login when unauthenticated. This is the root cause fix: the app had no router guard, so the home screen rendered without checking auth state.
BUILD 16 FIX: initAuth() calls supabase.auth.signOut({ scope: 'local' }) on cold launch — clears persisted Supabase session from AsyncStorage.
BUILD 16 FIX: onAuthStateChange gated by manualOwnerLoginRef — ignores all session events unless manual login set the flag.
BUILD 16 FIX: manualOwnerLoginRef set unconditionally in login(), loginOwnerPasswordless(), verify2FA().
BUILD 14 FIX: Diagnostics banner visible prop bound to state, defaults false.
BUILD 14 FIX: runtime-environment.ts classifies bare-workflow release APK as standalone/production.
BUILD 14 FIX: build-info.ts reads from Constants.expoConfig.extra.
remainingWork: Install build 17 APK on real device and verify: cold launch redirects to /login (owner login screen appears), manual login works, post-login navigation to home works, Owner AI works after manual login, diagnostics banner hidden by default.
blockers: EXPO_TOKEN / Expo account is not available in the sandbox; APK was built locally instead of via EAS.
GitHub token is expired, so the GitHub repo connected to Render cannot receive new commits.
litterbox.catbox.moe is experiencing a server-side outage (HTTP 500); APK uploaded to gofile.io as fallback.
